zh.lifeSummary: 當Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry於1431年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 梅奧吉爾吉也維時，她的父親William Barry 8th Lord Barry34歲，母親Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore34歲。她於1445年8月22日與Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond在愛爾蘭庫迪 盧斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1486年12月25日在愛爾蘭庫迪 沃特福德德洛馬納 豪斯享年55歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 克里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry于1431年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 梅奧吉爾吉也維时，她的父亲William Barry 8th Lord Barry34岁，母亲Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore34岁。她于1445年8月22日与Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond在爱尔兰庫迪 盧斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1486年12月25日在爱尔兰庫迪 沃特福德德洛馬納 豪斯享年55岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 克里。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Barry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Aidan, Ciaran, Eoin, John Patrick, Kaitlin, Kieran, Murphy, Aileen, Brigid, Caitlin.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Beargha ‘descendant of Beargh’, a byname meaning ‘plunderer’.

Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Báire ‘descendant of Báire’, a short form of either of two Gaelic personal names, Bairrfhionn or Fionnbharr, both meaning ‘fair-topped’. This may also be the source of the Manx name Barry, whose family's main seat was Ballavarry in Kirk Andreas.

variants.name: Barr
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow) and northern Irish (Ulster): habitational name from any of various places in southwestern Scotland, in particular Ayrshire and Renfrewshire, named with Gaelic barr ‘height, hill’ or a Brittonic cognate of this.

English and Welsh: habitational name from Great Barr in Staffordshire. This is from Brittonic barro- ‘top, summit’, referring to Barr Beacon; there is evidence that this was known as la Bare in the 13th century.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Barre-en-Ouche in Eure, France, or perhaps from Barre-de-Semilly in Manche, France.

variants.name: Barrie
meanings: Scottish (Angus): habitational name from Barry in Angus or from another place so named, generally named with Gaelic barr ‘height, hill’, or from a British cognate of this word. This name is also the Scottish form of Barry .
French (Barrié): variant of Barrier .
Altered form of French   Baril  . Compare   Barry   7.

variants.name: Berry
meanings: Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Béara ‘descendant of Béara’, a personal name of unexplained etymology; or, in some cases, perhaps an Anglicized form of Irish and Manx Ó Beargha. Compare Barry 1.
Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Barrie  .
English: habitational name from any of several places called in Devon named with Old English byrig, dative case of burh ‘fortified manor house, stronghold’, such as Berry Pomeroy and Berrynarbor.

variants.name: Dubarry
meanings: French: variant of the topographic or habitational name Barry , with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’.

variants.name: Baril
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Normand, Alain, Armand, Ghislaine, Jacques, Jean-Marc, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Monique, Phillippe.
French: from Old French baril ‘barrel’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a cooper, or a nickname for a rotund man. Compare Barry 7 and Berry 7.

History: Jean Baril from the Saintonge region of France was in QC by 1673, when he married Marie Guillet, the first of his three wives. He died in 1724 in Batiscan, QC. His descendants also bear altered forms of the surname, such as Barrie, Bar(r)y, and Berry.

variants.name: Bary
meanings: Walloon and northern French: variant of   Barry   8.
French (southern): rare variant of   Barry   6.
Altered form of French   Baril  . Compare   Barry   7.

nameMeanings.name: Ellice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the numerous girls' names beginning with the syllable El-, in particular Eleanor . At the beginning of the 21st century it enjoyed a surge in popularity as an independent given name, often also used in compounds such as Ellie-Ann, Ellie-Mae, and Ellie-Louise.

variants.name: Elly
meanings: Pet form of any of the numerous girls' names beginning with the syllable El-, in particular Eleanor . At the beginning of the 21st century it enjoyed a surge in popularity as an independent given name, often also used in compounds such as Ellie-Ann, Ellie-Mae, and Ellie-Louise.

en.lifeSummary: When Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry was born in 1431, in Kilgeever, County Mayo, Ireland, her father, William Barry 8th Lord Barry, was 34 and her mother, Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore, was 34. She married Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond on 22 August 1445, in County Louth, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 25 December 1486, in Dromana House, County Waterford, Ireland, at the age of 55, and was buried in County Kerry, Ireland.

fr.Drogheda, IIreland: County of the Town of Drogheda, Irlande
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry est née en 1431, à Kilgeever, County Mayo, Irlande, son père, William Barry 8th Lord Barry, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond le 22 août 1445, à County Louth, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 décembre 1486, à Dromana House, County Waterford, Irlande, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à County Kerry, Irlande.

de.Drogheda, IIreland: County of the Town of Drogheda, Irland
de.lifeSummary: Als Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry 1431 in Kilgeever, County Mayo, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Barry 8th Lord Barry 34 und ihre Mutter Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore 34. Sie hat am 22. August 1445 in County Louth, Irland Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Dezember 1486 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Dromana House, County Waterford, Irland und wurde in County Kerry, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry è nata il nel 1431 nel Kilgeever, County Mayo, Irlanda, sua padre, William Barry 8th Lord Barry, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond il 22 agosto 1445, nel County Louth, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 25 dicembre 1486, nel Dromana House, County Waterford, Irlanda, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a County Kerry, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barryが1431年にアイルランドコウントイ メイオキルジェエバーで生まれた時，父William Barry 8th Lord Barryは34歳，母Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymoreは34歳であった。1445年8月22日にアイルランドコウントイ ロウスでThomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1486年12月25日にアイルランドコウントイ ワテルフォードドロマナ ホーウゼで55歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ ケリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Drogheda, IIreland: 아일랜드 카운티 프 테 타운 프 드로게이다
ko.lifeSummary: Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry(이)가 1431년 아일랜드 카운티 메이요 킬그이버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Barry 8th Lord Barry(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1445년 8월 22일 아일랜드 카운티 루스에서 Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1486년 12월 25일 아일랜드 카운티 왓르퍼드 드로먼아 허스에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 케리에 묻혔다.

pt.Drogheda, IIreland: County of the Town of Drogheda, Irlanda
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry nasceu em 1431, em Kilgeever, County Mayo, Irlanda, seu pai, William Barry 8th Lord Barry, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond em 22 de agosto de 1445, em County Louth, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de dezembro de 1486, em Dromana House, County Waterford, Irlanda, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em County Kerry, Irlanda.

ro.Drogheda, IIreland: County of the Town of Drogheda, Irlanda

ru.Drogheda, IIreland: коунти оф т тоун оф дрогеда, Ирландия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry родилась в 1431 г. в местности килгивир, коунти меио, Ирландия, её отцу по имени William Barry 8th Lord Barry было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond 22 августа 1445 г. в местности коунти лоут, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 25 декабря 1486 г. в местности дромана хоус, коунти вэитирфорд, Ирландия в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности коунти кирри, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry nació en 1431, en Kilgeever, County Mayo, Irlanda, su papá, William Barry 8th Lord Barry, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Lady Ellen de la Roche Baroness of Barrymore, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond el 22 de agosto de 1445, en County Louth, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 25 de diciembre de 1486, en Dromana House, County Waterford, Irlanda, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en County Kerry, Irlanda.
